title: SPC Dashboard
description: Statistical process control — X-bar / R / control limits / Cpk.

list.name: factory
list.label: Factory
list.definition: SELECT name AS "__text", code AS "__value" FROM factories WHERE "isActive" = true ORDER BY name
list.query: SELECT name AS "__text", code AS "__value" FROM factories WHERE "isActive" = true ORDER BY name

list.name: area
list.label: Area
list.definition: SELECT a.name AS "__text", a.id AS "__value" FROM areas a JOIN factories f ON f.id = a."factoryId" WHERE ('$factory' = '' OR f.code = '$factory') ORDER BY a.name
list.query: SELECT a.name AS "__text", a.id AS "__value" FROM areas a JOIN factories f ON f.id = a."factoryId" WHERE ('$factory' = '' OR f.code = '$factory') ORDER BY a.name

list.name: line
list.label: Production Line
list.definition: SELECT l.name AS "__text", l.id AS "__value" FROM production_lines l JOIN factories f ON f.id = l."factoryId" WHERE ('$factory' = '' OR f.code = '$factory') ORDER BY l.name
list.query: SELECT l.name AS "__text", l.id AS "__value" FROM production_lines l JOIN factories f ON f.id = l."factoryId" WHERE ('$factory' = '' OR f.code = '$factory') ORDER BY l.name

list.name: machine
list.label: Machine
list.definition: SELECT m.name AS "__text", m.id AS "__value" FROM machines m JOIN factories f ON f.id = m."factoryId" WHERE ('$factory' = '' OR f.code = '$factory') ORDER BY m.name
list.query: SELECT m.name AS "__text", m.id AS "__value" FROM machines m JOIN factories f ON f.id = m."factoryId" WHERE ('$factory' = '' OR f.code = '$factory') ORDER BY m.name

list.name: shift
list.label: Shift
list.definition: SELECT s.name AS "__text", s.id AS "__value" FROM shift_templates s JOIN factories f ON f.id = s."factoryId" WHERE ('$factory' = '' OR f.code = '$factory') ORDER BY s.name
list.query: SELECT s.name AS "__text", s.id AS "__value" FROM shift_templates s JOIN factories f ON f.id = s."factoryId" WHERE ('$factory' = '' OR f.code = '$factory') ORDER BY s.name

list.name: product
list.label: Product
list.definition: SELECT k.name AS "__text", k.id AS "__value" FROM skus k JOIN factories f ON f.id = k."factoryId" WHERE ('$factory' = '' OR f.code = '$factory') ORDER BY k.name
list.query: SELECT k.name AS "__text", k.id AS "__value" FROM skus k JOIN factories f ON f.id = k."factoryId" WHERE ('$factory' = '' OR f.code = '$factory') ORDER BY k.name

list.name: batch
list.label: Batch
list.definition: SELECT b."batchNumber" AS "__text", b.id AS "__value" FROM batch_records b JOIN factories f ON f.id = b."factoryId" WHERE ('$factory' = '' OR f.code = '$factory') ORDER BY b."startTime" DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 500
list.query: SELECT b."batchNumber" AS "__text", b.id AS "__value" FROM batch_records b JOIN factories f ON f.id = b."factoryId" WHERE ('$factory' = '' OR f.code = '$factory') ORDER BY b."startTime" DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 500

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM spc_measurements t JOIN factories f ON f.id = t."factoryId" WHERE $__timeFilter(t."measuredAt") AND ('$factory' = '' OR f.code = '$factory') AND ('$machine' = '' OR t."machineId" = '$machine')

SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM spc_measurements t JOIN factories f ON f.id = t."factoryId" WHERE $__timeFilter(t."measuredAt") AND ('$factory' = '' OR f.code = '$factory') AND ('$machine' = '' OR t."machineId" = '$machine') AND t."isOutOfControl"=true

SELECT CASE WHEN STDDEV_SAMP(t.value)>0 THEN ROUND(((MAX(t.usl)-MIN(t.lsl))/(6*STDDEV_SAMP(t.value)))::numeric,2) ELSE NULL END AS value FROM spc_measurements t JOIN factories f ON f.id = t."factoryId" WHERE $__timeFilter(t."measuredAt") AND ('$factory' = '' OR f.code = '$factory') AND ('$machine' = '' OR t."machineId" = '$machine') AND t.usl IS NOT NULL

SELECT CASE WHEN STDDEV_SAMP(t.value)>0 THEN ROUND((LEAST((MAX(t.usl)-AVG(t.value)),(AVG(t.value)-MIN(t.lsl)))/(3*STDDEV_SAMP(t.value)))::numeric,2) ELSE NULL END AS value FROM spc_measurements t JOIN factories f ON f.id = t."factoryId" WHERE $__timeFilter(t."measuredAt") AND ('$factory' = '' OR f.code = '$factory') AND ('$machine' = '' OR t."machineId" = '$machine') AND t.usl IS NOT NULL

SELECT t."measuredAt" AS time, t.value AS "Value" FROM spc_measurements t JOIN factories f ON f.id = t."factoryId" WHERE $__timeFilter(t."measuredAt") AND ('$factory' = '' OR f.code = '$factory') AND ('$machine' = '' OR t."machineId" = '$machine') ORDER BY t."measuredAt"

SELECT t."measuredAt" AS time, t.ucl AS "UCL" FROM spc_measurements t JOIN factories f ON f.id = t."factoryId" WHERE $__timeFilter(t."measuredAt") AND ('$factory' = '' OR f.code = '$factory') AND ('$machine' = '' OR t."machineId" = '$machine') ORDER BY t."measuredAt"

SELECT t."measuredAt" AS time, t.cl AS "Center" FROM spc_measurements t JOIN factories f ON f.id = t."factoryId" WHERE $__timeFilter(t."measuredAt") AND ('$factory' = '' OR f.code = '$factory') AND ('$machine' = '' OR t."machineId" = '$machine') ORDER BY t."measuredAt"

SELECT t."measuredAt" AS time, t.lcl AS "LCL" FROM spc_measurements t JOIN factories f ON f.id = t."factoryId" WHERE $__timeFilter(t."measuredAt") AND ('$factory' = '' OR f.code = '$factory') AND ('$machine' = '' OR t."machineId" = '$machine') ORDER BY t."measuredAt"

SELECT t."parameterName" AS "Parameter", t.value AS "Value", t."controlViolation" AS "Rule", t."measuredAt" AS "When" FROM spc_measurements t JOIN factories f ON f.id=t."factoryId" WHERE $__timeFilter(t."measuredAt") AND ('$factory' = '' OR f.code = '$factory') AND t."isOutOfControl"=true ORDER BY t."measuredAt" DESC LIMIT 50
